frase_original: The cause of the WPK is a sacred historic cause for fully realizing the independence of the masses of the people, the cause of the Juche revolution.

texto: A revolutionary party is, in its essence, the party of its leader that carries out his ideology and cause, and the main thing in its building is to ensure the unitary character and inheritance of his ideology and leadership.
explicacao: Citação de Kim Jong-un sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “A revolutionary party is, in its essence, the party of its leader that carries out his ideology a…” articula lideranca, leader, character em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como character e building.

texto: To apply Kim Jong Il's patriotism means to thoroughly materialize the General's intentions and desires for the prosperity of the country and the happiness of all generations to come and to carry on all work for achieving the prosperity of the country in the way he did.

texto: The new year 2015 will be a year of great significance, in which we will mark the 70th anniversaries of national liberation and founding of the Workers' Party of Korea.
explicacao: Citação de Kim Jong-un sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “The new year 2015 will be a year of great significance, in which we will mark the 70th anniversar…” articula trabalho, great, party em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como ano-novo e trabalho.
